message:
Running command: 
# 168 min CPU / ~45 min elapsed. Still computing in groups phase.
# Large design DRT groups can take several hours.
# Use 8-hour wait
sleep 28800
echo "=== DRT LONG CHECK $(date) ==="
STEP70_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
stat "$STEP70_LOG" | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG"
tail -30 "$STEP70_LOG"
ls -lh "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -lh "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "OpenROAD PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD has EXITED - checking final state"
wc -l /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
tail -25 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
ls -la "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/" | grep "^d" | tail -10
# Also check if final results appeared
ls "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL DIRECTORY EXISTS!" || echo "final/ not yet created"
